'''Ceramo-Werx''' was a manufacturing facility once owned by [[Quaffug]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] took control of the facility after beating [[Quaffug]] in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]].

{{Company-stub}}
